title: Search Functionality
description: Build search feature for discovering users and photos. Implement search bar component in header/navigation. Create search results page with tabs for users and photos. Build user search using username and bio full-text search. Build photo search using AI-generated tags and captions (once available) plus manual tags. Implement search suggestions/autocomplete for common queries. Add recent searches history. Handle no results states with suggestions. Optimize search queries with proper indexing.
